fields.title: Fix pre-existing exactOptionalPropertyTypes errors in parser.ts and sandbox/config.ts
fields.description: 3 TypeScript errors with exactOptionalPropertyTypes: inferPresetFromModes receives object with explicit undefined values for optional fields. Fix by conditionally including fields only when defined.
fields.close_reason: Fixed all 3 exactOptionalPropertyTypes errors: updated inferPresetFromModes signature to accept undefined explicitly, and built config object conditionally in computeEffectiveConfig.
